'''Odie Subu''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as a reconnaissance trooper in a reconnaissance platoon of the [[Praesitlyn Defense Force]]. She was slightly younger than [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. Odie and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Erk H'Arman]] were the sole survivors of the defense force over [[Praesitlyn/Legends|Praesitlyn]] that had been commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Khamar]].

==Biography==
During the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]], she and H'Arman fought against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Battle droid/Legends|droid]] army with [[Sons and Daughters of Freedom|Freedom's Sons]] and a task force commanded by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Nejaa Halcyon]] and future [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] Anakin Skywalker. After returning from her mission with H'Arman, she was startled by the returning reconnaissance crew she accidentally blasted a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] named [[Grudo]], believing he was the enemy. He died later that day. After their victory, Subu and H'Arman were married and, at Subu's request, Skywalker agreed to preside over the ceremony.
